description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Approved Resilience Technical Committee members are defined as Active Data in [A.2.
.1.1.1.2.3.0.6.1 - Resilience Fund Technical Committee List Of Current Members](10b0e0aa-0338-40d7-b1e6-a29442c206e6).
The Active Data is updated as follows:
- The Responsible Party is the Support Facilitators.
- The Update Process must follow the protocol for ‘Direct Edit’.
